prompt: No text, no letters, no logos, no watermark. Original 3D game mascot concept sheet for a mobile FPS hero, playful energetic classic platformer spirit without copying any existing character. A bipedal fox-marsupial alien trickster with oversized expressive eyes, tall swept ears, spiky forelock, athletic torso, short snout, fingerless gloves, chunky sneakers, utility belt, and clear five-finger hands shaped to hold a sci-fi blaster handle. Show front, side, back, idle pose, low-health exhausted pose, and victory dance pose on a clean neutral studio background. Bright orange fur, teal accents, gunmetal gear, readable silhouette, high-detail stylized 3D render, game-ready proportions, no weapon in hand.
composition: full body turnarounds plus action poses, generous padding
constraints: original character only; no brand likeness; no text; no logos; no watermark; hands must clearly hold a future gun grip

prompt: No text, no letters, no logos, no watermark. Original 3D game mascot concept sheet for Sigilbreaker: a mischievous gadget runner hero with compact humanoid body, big grin, expressive brows, swept-back crest hair, fox-like tail used for balance, mechanical wrist bracer, fingerless gloves, boots, and a slung empty holster. constraints: do not resemble any known mascot or copyrighted character; no text; no logos; no watermark

prompt: No text, no letters, no logos, no watermark. Original playable mascot hero concept for a mobile landscape Three.js FPS, designed for title screen, level-complete cutscenes, and third-person celebration shots. prompt: No text, no letters, no logos, no watermark. Original animated main-character concept sheet for a playful mobile FPS hero.
